test_output_summary: 402 passed in 15.82s (4 new tests for TASK-FIX-k3l4, 398 pre-existing)
implementation_notes: Added targeted asyncio exception handler to suppress SDK async generator cleanup noise. Three changes made: (1) Added module-level _SDK_CLEANUP_SUPPRESS_PATTERNS list and _patched_loops set, plus the _install_sdk_cleanup_handler() function after the TASK_WORK_SDK_MAX_TURNS constant at line 112. (2) Called _install_sdk_cleanup_handler(asyncio.get_running_loop()) in _invoke_sdk_direct() just before async with asyncio.timeout(...) at the first SDK query location. (3) Called _install_sdk_cleanup_handler(asyncio.get_running_loop()) in the task-work SDK method just before async with asyncio.timeout(...) at the second SDK query location. The handler is idempotent via a module-level set tracking loop ids. Only the two specified patterns are suppressed; all other asyncio exceptions are passed through to the default handler.
requirements_addressed: Module-level _SDK_CLEANUP_SUPPRESS_PATTERNS list with the two specified patterns

completion_promises.criterion_text: Define module-level suppression patterns list with the two specified patterns
completion_promises.evidence: Added _SDK_CLEANUP_SUPPRESS_PATTERNS = ['Attempted to exit cancel scope in a different task', 'Command failed with exit code 1'] after TASK_WORK_SDK_MAX_TURNS constant in agent_invoker.py

completion_promises.criterion_text: Create _install_sdk_cleanup_handler(loop) that is idempotent and installs targeted handler
completion_promises.evidence: Implemented _install_sdk_cleanup_handler using _patched_loops set for idempotency. Handler checks message and exception string against _SDK_CLEANUP_SUPPRESS_PATTERNS, suppresses matches silently, and delegates non-matches to loop.default_exception_handler.

completion_promises.evidence: Added _install_sdk_cleanup_handler(asyncio.get_running_loop()) just before the async with asyncio.timeout(self.sdk_timeout_seconds) line in the direct SDK invocation method.

completion_promises.evidence: Added _install_sdk_cleanup_handler(asyncio.get_running_loop()) just before the async with asyncio.timeout(self.sdk_timeout_seconds) line in the task-work delegation SDK method.

completion_promises.evidence: Test creates a loop, installs the handler, sends a context with RuntimeError('Attempted to exit cancel scope in a different task than it was entered in'), verifies default handler is NOT called.

Test creates a loop, installs the handler, sends an unrelated RuntimeError, verifies the default handler IS called with the exact context dict.
